mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SPENDING_TREND ( TREND_ID, USER_ID, YEAR_MONTH, CONTENT ) VALUES ( nextval('SEQ_TREND'), #{userId}, #{yearMonth}, #{content} ) ON CONFLICT (USER_ID, YEAR_MONTH) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT TREND_ID, USER_ID, YEAR_MONTH, CONTENT, CREATED_AT FROM SPENDING_TREND WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND YEAR_MONTH = #{yearMonth} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
